title: Sweets [Farmer's Delight Add-on]
description: Make your New Year's pretzel and other sweets.
body:
![sweets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65638437082552c08ca4ea4c7444fede4535c8c.png)
## 📖 What is this mod?
### English
Sweets are a small unofficial addition to Farmer's Delight.After installing the mod, you can create pretzels, caramels and other sweets. Strawberries will also start to grow.

### Русский
Сладости - это небольшое неофициальное дополнение к Farmer's Delight.После установки мода вы сможете создавать крендельки, карамельки и другие сладости. Так же начнёт расти клубника.

To make strawberries in chocolate, you can use chocolate from [Sweets](https://modrinth.com/mod/sweets) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

PKM in the form of caramel to create a pretzel.
Pretzel is a tasty weapon. When you press PKM, it eats and gives regeneration.  
Toffee is a very nutritious food  


I'm developing a big update.
